name: Titan Machinery Inc.
summary: Titan Machinery Inc. owns and operates a network of full-service agricultural and construction equipment stores in the United States, Europe, and Australia. Founded in 1980, the company is the largest retail dealer of Case IH Agriculture equipment worldwide. It operates four segments—Agriculture, Construction, Europe, and Australia—offering new and used equipment sales, parts sales, equipment repair and maintenance services, and equipment rental across 144 total stores.

products.name: New Agricultural Equipment
products.description: Case IH, New Holland Agriculture brand machinery and attachments for large-scale farming to home and garden use.

products.name: New Construction Equipment
products.description: Case Construction and New Holland Construction heavy and light industrial machinery for commercial, residential, and infrastructure construction.

products.name: Used Equipment
products.description: Used agricultural and construction equipment acquired primarily through customer trade-ins.

products.name: Parts Sales
products.description: In-house parts inventory providing timely parts support for agricultural and construction equipment.

products.name: Equipment Repair and Maintenance Services
products.description: On-site and off-site repair, warranty repairs, and preventive maintenance services for customer equipment.

products.name: Equipment Rental
products.description: Short-term and seasonal equipment rental primarily in the Construction segment with rent-to-own options.

products.name: Precision Farming Products
products.description: GPS signal subscriptions, farm data management products, and precision farming technology support services.

products.name: CNH Finance and Insurance Products
products.description: Finance and insurance products offered through CNH partnership as ancillary business activities.

partnerships.description: Authorized dealer since 1980 for Case IH Agriculture, New Holland Agriculture, Case Construction, and New Holland Construction brands.
